title: ornithoxanthum arvense
intro: Ornithoxanthum arvense, also known as field lavender, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. Its medicinal properties lie in its essential oils, which have been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ornithoxanthum arvense include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Ornithoxanthum arvense often include teas, infusions, and topical applications such as creams and salves.
